g.text: Orange shows control-plane reconciliation; purple shows runtime
Inference fleet: per-cluster serving stacks and endpoint targets
KV locality: keep prefill/decode inside one
Stubs exist for Dynamo / Grove / planner /
router / workers; they may replace or
v0.1 implemented: GKE/EKS/BYO; Traefik control gateway; Envoy/GAIE workload gateways; Deployment/LWS; DRA; HF → RWX
ModelCache. Early limits: equal-weight routing; no capacity scoring, anti-affinity policy, or transient failover.
Design/stub: DynamoBackend, Grove / ModelExpress / DGD; one Modelplane API, no user-facing orchestrator switch.
